TND-DRR7.project_name: Delhi Ring Road - Section 7 (Mahipalpur to Dwarka)
TND-DRR7.description: 6-lane elevated expressway connecting Mahipalpur to Dwarka Sector 21. Includes 3 flyovers, 2 underpasses, and full utility relocation. Funded under NHDP Phase VII.

TND-MCR2.project_name: Mumbai Coastal Road Extension - Phase 2 (Worli to Bandra)
TND-MCR2.description: 8-lane coastal arterial road with twin tunnels and marine interchanges. MMRDA managed. Includes environment-sensitive marine wall reinforcement.

TND-PNB4.project_name: Pune Bypass NH-48 - Package 4 (Urse to Talegaon)
TND-PNB4.description: 4-lane bypass reducing Pune city traffic. Includes 2 ROBs and toll plaza construction. MoRTH funded.
